items.title: Heard on the Street Recap: The Fed’s in a Tight Spot
items.description: Suspense is building in the market ahead of the Federal Reserve's interest-rate announcement coming Wednesday afternoon.  Retail sales rose 0.6% in August, which was higher than the 0.3% rise economists had predicted.  Stronger retail sales may complicate the case for numerous interest rate cuts if central bankers believe inflation is still a risk.

items.title: Amazon (AMZN) Launches $5 RxPass Medication Subscription in Texas
items.description: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the 10 Unrivaled Stocks of the Next 3 Years. On September 8, Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) announced that its full-service online pharmacy, Amazon Pharmacy, is expanding RxPass to Texas. This brings RxPass and its $5 monthly prescription subscription service to 2 million Texans living in areas where there are few […]
